name: extract_requirements
description: Persist, retrieve, and manage structured requirements for a BA project. The calling agent performs the analysis and extracts requirements from source text; this skill stores and manages those pre-structured records. Supports bulk add, list with filters, update, approval workflow, and individual get. Requirement types: functional, non_functional, constraint, assumption.

action.description: 'add' one or more pre-structured requirements, 'list' with optional filters, 'update' an existing requirement, 'approve' a requirement (sets status=approved), 'get' a single requirement by req_id.

user_id.description: User ID from session context. Always required.

project.description: Project scope. Used for add and as filter in list.

req_id.description: UUID of the requirement. Required for update, approve, and get.

approver.description: Name or ID of the person approving. Required for approve.

requirements.description: List of requirement objects to insert (used with add). Each object must have title, description, and req_type, and may have acceptance_criteria, priority, and source.

req_type.description: Filter by requirement type (list action). Also used in update to change type.

status.description: Filter by status (list action). Also used in update to change status.

acceptance_criteria.description: List of testable acceptance criteria (update action).

source.description: Source document or stakeholder the requirement came from (update action).

inserted.description: Summary of inserted requirements [{req_id, title, req_type}] (add action).

count.description: Number of records inserted or returned.
